creator: freebsd@johnlevine.com
text:
version 6.8.9-4 won't build due to two missing .la files.  I locally futzed with the two other ports to install them, and it builds OK.

I've run into similar problems in the past and don't know whether the fix is to have libiconv and libffi install the .la files again, or adjust ImageMagick so it doesn't need them.

FreeBSD joyce.lan 9.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE #0 r268512: Thu Jul 10 23:44:39 UTC 2014     root@snap.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
